excerpts.excerpt_text: Therapist note keeps the user wording separate and marks the earlier panic timing as unresolved.
I wrote that the panic episode happened before the GP visit, but I was still unsure of the exact day.
The clinic letter confirms a GP visit on 2025-03-18 and records medication advice.
